---
name: zigmodu-orm
description: Generate ZigModu ORM modules from SQL schema. Machine-generation step — zmodu produces 100% of model/persistence/service/api/module. AI only extends via ext/ files.
allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob
---

# Generate ORM from SQL — Machine Generation Step

## ⛔ Principle: zmodu generates everything, AI never edits generated files.

Generated files (⛔ DO NOT EDIT — marked `@generated by zmodu`):
```
model.zig · persistence.zig · service.zig · api.zig · module.zig
```

AI extension files (✅ safe to edit):
```
ext/service.zig · ext/api.zig · src/shared/ · src/business/ · tests/
```

## Commands

```bash
# Full project from SQL
zmodu scaffold --sql schema.sql --name <project> --json-style camel

# ORM only (modules under existing project)
zmodu orm --sql schema.sql --out src/modules

# Regenerate after schema change
zmodu orm --sql schema.sql --out src/modules --force
```

## After Generation

```bash
# 1. Verify compilation
zig build                    # must be 0 errors

# 2. Identify AI work needed
#    - JOIN queries → ext/service.zig
#    - Business validation → ext/service.zig
#    - Custom endpoints → ext/api.zig
#    - Cross-module orchestration → src/business/

# 3. Never edit @generated files
#    They get overwritten on --force regeneration
```

## SQL Type → Zig Type

| SQL | Zig |
|-----|-----|
| INT/BIGINT/SERIAL | `i64` |
| VARCHAR/TEXT/JSON | `[]const u8` |
| BOOLEAN | `bool` |
| FLOAT/DOUBLE/DECIMAL | `f64` |
| DATETIME/TIMESTAMP | `[]const u8` |

## Model Field Rules (zmodu auto-applies)

- PRIMARY KEY: `?i64 = null` (auto-generated, optional)
- NOT NULL without DEFAULT: `Type` (required, non-optional)
- Nullable or has DEFAULT: `?Type = null` (must have `= null` for Zig 0.16)
- `json_names` table for camelCase JSON output (--json-style camel)

## Module Structure

```
src/modules/<name>/
├── module.zig       # ⛔ lifecycle + barrel re-exports + health
├── model.zig        # ⛔ data structs
├── persistence.zig  # ⛔ ORM Repository(T)
├── service.zig      # ⛔ CRUD + validate
├── api.zig          # ⛔ REST handlers
└── ext/             # ✅ AI extension directory
    ├── service.zig  # custom business logic
    └── api.zig      # custom endpoints
```

## Auto-Grouping

Tables with common prefix → single module. Prefix stripped from names.
`zmodu_order` → module `order`, model `Order`, route `/orders`

## FOREIGN KEY → Dependency

`FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES user(id)` → module depends on "user"
